title: "@Qualifier" should not be used on "@Bean" methods
description: The @Qualifier annotation is intended to disambiguate beans when multiple candidates are present for autowiring. However, using @Qualifier on @Bean methods is not recommended, as it can lead to confusion and unexpected behavior in Spring's dependency injection. Instead, rely on the bean name or other mechanisms for disambiguation.
recommendation: Remove the @Qualifier annotation from @Bean methods and use the bean name for injection where necessary.
impact: Using @Qualifier on @Bean methods may result in incorrect bean resolution and maintenance issues.

checks.message: @Qualifier should not be used on @Bean methods. Remove the @Qualifier annotation and use the bean name for injection where necessary.
